div.p: Engineer Manual: Determine file availability based on subtree control bitmasks. Mechanism: cgroup_apply_control() -> css_populate_dir()

g.title: Child nodes inherit capability but require explicit enablement via parent

ol.li: Validation: cgroup_control_audit() ensures enabled bits in subtree_control are present in cgroup.controllers.
Propagation: The bitmask is merged into the child's cgrp->subtree_ss_mask.
Realization: For every child, cgroup_apply_control_enable() iterates through all enabled subsystems.
Inode Creation: css_populate_dir() is called for each enabled subsystem, creating the .max and .stat files shown above.

p.code: # Enable memory, cpu, and pids for children

g.title: Child nodes inherit capability but require explicit enablement via parent
